series_metadata.series_title: Remittance of Boat & Motor (BAM), Housing Trust Fund
series_metadata.series_description: Counties collect Boat & Motor (BAM), Housing Trust Fund, and remit aggregate amounts to the state on a periodic basis. This record series includes OAKS revenue documents and other supporting documentation showing the remittance of funds into the proper account.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 1 fiscal years. ; Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 1 fiscal years
